channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: promptfoo / promptfoo
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #4
Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. AI Red teaming, pentesting, and vulnerability scanning for LLMs. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration.
Language: TypeScript 632 stars today

item.title: obra / superpowers
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #8
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
Language: Shell 1,387 stars today

item.title: sepinf-inc / IPED
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #10
IPED Digital Forensic Tool. It is an open source software that can be used to process and analyze digital evidence, often seized at crime scenes by law enforcement or in a corporate investigation by private examiners.
Language: Java 292 stars today

item.title: bytedance / deer-flow
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #13
An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skills and subagents, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
Language: Python 1,443 stars today

item.title: msitarzewski / agency-agents
item.description:
📈 Rank: #8 → #1 (↑7) | ⭐ Stars: 18,928 → 24,053 (+5125)

Language: Shell 6,235 stars today
